name: Bolehall
description:
Bordering the historic Watling Street or A5, Bolehall is within easy walking distance of Tamworth town centre.

The area has a young and growing population served by four primary schools. The area also has canal towpaths providing walks around Tamworth.

It borders with Warwickshire Moor and has large football pitches for the local community. Bolehall’s good road links make it a popular place for families who also enjoy the many areas of open space.
